title: RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The issue was limited funding avenues for rural enterprises. RBI added AgriSURE, enabling RRBs to finance agri-startups and strengthen rural economies.
The post RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
